tasks.label: Docker: Start Debug Stack
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -f docker-compose.debug.yml up --build -d && echo 'Waiting for debugpy on :5678...' && until nc -z localhost 5678 2>/dev/null; do sleep 2; done && echo 'debugpy ready'

tasks.label: Docker: Stop All
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -f docker-compose.debug.yml down

tasks.label: Docker: View Logs (backend)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f backend

tasks.label: Docker: Start DB+Redis
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db redis && echo 'Waiting for postgres on :5432...' && until (echo > /dev/tcp/localhost/5432) 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done && echo 'Waiting for redis on :6379...' && until (echo > /dev/tcp/localhost/6379) 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done && echo 'db+redis ready'

tasks.label: Docker: Stop DB+Redis
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml stop db redis

tasks.label: Venv: Create + Install
tasks.command: python3.11 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip wheel setuptools && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements.dev.txt

tasks.label: Alembic: Run Migrations
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec backend alembic upgrade head
